name: Omon.intpppicoSouth30
title: Net Primary Mole Productivity of Carbon by Picophytoplankton
description: Vertically integrated primary (organic carbon) production by the picophytoplankton component alone
processing note:
CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:area: mean where sea depth: sum where sea time: mean CMIP7:area: mean where sea depth: sum where sea (over entire ocean column) time: mean,
This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of Omon.intpppicoSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
